calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights [Rents], Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jul-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David B. Golden, Esq. of Golden & Kopcke, Tel. 415.399.9994, appearing for plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. After hearing, the court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFFS ALFONSO MARTIN AND GERARDO MARTIN'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights [Rents] and Restraining Order is granted. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Trent Thornley, Not reported

Ntc Of Mtn For Assignment Of Rights (Rents) Restraining Order And Turnover Order And Pos
Off Calendar Jun-01-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: no appearances.

parties are deemed to have stipulated that the motion will be decided by the Pro Tem Judge with the same authority as a Superior Court Judge.

the court adopts its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF ALFONSO MARTIN, GERARDO MARTIN's Motion For Assignment Of Rights (Rents) Restraining Order And Turnover Order is DENIED. Failure to provide proof of judgment debtor's ownership of 3rd Street property or 17th Street property.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order.

judge pro tem rebecca woodson, not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Apr-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
David Golden, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Alfonso Martin and Gerardo Martin.

Plaintiff's Witness Gerardo Martin was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants Elpidio Gorez and Veronica Gomez as follows:

Damages/Principal - $64,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,048.00
Attorney's Fees - 5,680.00
Costs - $660.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $71,388.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
